claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch uses provider-adapter to configure Claude agents with read-only tool restrictions through DEMAND_EVIDENCE_CLAUDE_READ_ONLY_SETTINGS that restricts tools to Read, Glob, Grep and denies Write, Edit, MultiEdit, NotebookEdit, Bash, Agent, TaskCreate, TaskUpdate, and provider-adapter translates these settings into Claude CLI arguments --allowedTools and --disallowedTools.

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_CLAUDE_READ_ONLY_SETTINGS defines permissions.allow array with Read, Glob, Grep and permissions.deny array with Write, Edit, MultiEdit, NotebookEdit, Bash, Agent, TaskCreate, TaskUpdate.
evidence.why: Verifies the read-only settings schema for Claude evidence agents.

evidence.summary: When provider is claude, executionConfig sets ai.settings to DEMAND_EVIDENCE_CLAUDE_READ_ONLY_SETTINGS JSON string, ai.claude_tools to Read,Glob,Grep, ai.claude_allowed_tools to Read,Glob,Grep, and ai.claude_disallowed_tools to Write,Edit,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit,Bash,Agent,TaskCreate,TaskUpdate.
evidence.why: Verifies execution config applies read-only settings for Claude provider.

evidence.summary: buildProviderInvocation for claude provider builds args array with --tools, --allowedTools, and --disallowedTools flags from config.ai.claude_tools, config.ai.claude_allowed_tools, and config.ai.claude_disallowed_tools.
evidence.why: Verifies provider adapter translates config into Claude CLI tool arguments.

evidence.summary: buildProviderInvocation switches on provider type: codex uses --sandbox read-only and --approval never, custom uses rendered custom_command, claude uses --tools, --allowedTools, --disallowedTools, --permission-mode, --settings, and other flags.
evidence.why: Verifies Claude provider argument construction logic.

evidence.summary: Claude evidence agent config includes ai.claude_disable_slash_commands true and ai.claude_no_session_persistence true.
evidence.why: Verifies additional Claude safety constraints beyond read-only tools.

evidence.summary: buildProviderInvocation adds --disable-slash-commands when ai.claude_disable_slash_commands is true and --no-session-persistence when ai.claude_no_session_persistence is true.
evidence.why: Verifies provider adapter implements Claude safety flags.

evidence.summary: executionConfig function loads config, extracts provider and model options, and overrides provider-specific settings for codex sandbox/approval and Claude read-only tools and safety flags.
evidence.why: Verifies execution config centralizes evidence agent hardening.

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS defines explorer, cross_checker, and verifier with writes_code false and result_schema yolo.demand.evidence_result.v1.
evidence.why: Verifies evidence agent protocol specification matches implementation.

evidence.summary: Previous dispatch result shows execution_policy with default_mode dry_run, execute_requires executeAgents=true and allowAgentDispatch=true, writes_business_code false, agent_instruction read_only, and agent_results from explorer/cross-checker/verifier using codex provider.
evidence.why: Verifies dispatch has executed with read-only policy and provider agents have completed.

risks: If Claude CLI ignores --allowedTools or --disallowedTools flags, read-only enforcement could fail despite configuration.
If evidence-dispatch executionConfig is bypassed or provider settings are overridden after calling executionConfig, read-only constraints may not apply to spawned agents.
The provider adapter uses --permission-mode default rather than a locked mode, so permission mode changes could affect tool availability beyond allowedTools/disallowedTools.
missing: I did not verify actual Claude CLI behavior with --allowedTools and --disallowedTools flags to confirm they prevent Write, Edit, Bash, and other denied tools.
I did not verify whether codex provider read-only sandbox behavior matches Claude provider read-only tool restrictions.
I did not find integration tests that execute provider-adapter with real Claude CLI to verify tool restrictions are enforced at runtime.

result.notes: Source and config evidence confirms DEMAND_EVIDENCE_CLAUDE_READ_ONLY_SETTINGS schema and provider-adapter translation to Claude CLI arguments. External enforcement verification and cross-checker independent confirmation are required before treating this as runtime-verified fact.
